title: 1 step DFU - Content of the Software Update tab when there is update available only for Earbuds
scenario: Verify the Software Update tab displays correct update info for Earbuds and up-to-date status for Charge Case when only Earbuds have a new version available.
steps: Start the app with Osprey where only the Earbuds have an update available.
expected: Earbuds show current and available version, release notes, and an Update button. Charge Case is marked as up to date.
